Hayar

11

Mindful Tracing Colouring Pages Collection | Relaxing Adult Colouring | Mindful | Self Care | Calming

Mindful Tracing Colouring Pages are a unique and relaxing way to practice self-care and bring mindfulness into your daily life. The beautiful designs encourage you to focus on the present moment, as you carefully trace and colour each page. The soothing process can help to reduce stress, anxiety, and improve your mood. With 5 unique designs, this collection offers a wide variety of options for all skill levels. So, whether you're looking to unwind after a long day or simply take a few minutes to clear your mind, Mindful Tracing Colouring Pages are a great option. If you like this review, please like, share or leave a comment.

Danielle Collins' Face Yoga: Firming facial exercises & inspiring tips to glow, inside and out

"Face Yoga" provides exercises and techniques to improve the appearance of your face, relax your mind, and boost your mood. The exercises are easy to do, and the author's friendly and informative writing style makes learning a pleasure. The book is an enjoyable read that will leave you feeling more confident and happy. If you like this review please like, share or leave a comment.

Opal Facial Roller

Radiant Skincare: Anthropologie Opal Facial Roller <br> Revitalize your skincare routine with Anthropologie's Opal Facial Roller. Crafted from opal stone, it gently massages the skin, reducing puffiness and enhancing circulation. Its cooling effect soothes and rejuvenates, promoting a healthy glow. A luxurious addition to your beauty regimen, promoting relaxation and natural radiance with every use.

Madam Rose

38

When She Unravels: A Dark Mafia Romance

He's the most powerful man in Ibiza, and he'll do anything to make me his. I've been raised to be the perfect mafia wife, but when my marriage turns into a horrific nightmare, I have no choice but to leave everything behind and start a new life. I find myself alone in Ibiza-a place that swallows innocent girls like me alive. I'm robbed the day I arrive, left with nothing but a few euros and the clothes on my back. My desperation leads me right to Damiano De Rossi. He rules over this island with an iron fist and beneath his strikingly handsome face lies a wicked darkness. I ask him for a job. He gives me far more than that-degradation, jealousy, and toe-curling lust. When my resistance to him is all but gone, a secret is revealed, and we fall apart like a house of cards. I know what I have to do. Run. But when I try, I discover...he's already got me bound. ﻿When She Unravels is an 18+ dark mafia romance with mature themes, profanity, and plenty of steam. It's book one in The Fallen series but can be read as a standalone.

The Cruel Prince By Holly Black

Of course I want to be like them. They're beautiful as blades forged in some divine fire. They will live forever. And Cardan is even more beautiful than the rest. I hate him more than all the others. I hate him so much that sometimes when I look at him, I can hardly breathe. Jude was seven years old when her parents were murdered and she and her two sisters were stolen away to live in the treacherous High Court of Faerie. Ten years later, Jude wants nothing more than to belong there, despite her mortality. But many of the fey despise humans. Especially Prince Cardan, the youngest and wickedest son of the High King. To win a place at the Court, she must defy him--and face the consequences. In doing so, she becomes embroiled in palace intrigues and deceptions, discovering her own capacity for bloodshed. But as civil war threatens to drown the Courts of Faerie in violence, Jude will need to risk her life in a dangerous alliance to save her sisters, and Faerie itself.

Stinger - Kindle edition by Sheridan, Mia. Literature & ...

This is a really good book to read if you are into soft romances with a little bit of spice.

21

Mammoth Cave National Park (U.S. National Park Service)

The largest cave system in the world....its a pretty amazing experience. I highly suggest booking your tour, since they do fill up in advance. We love the lantern tour that we did. The caves are pretty cool, despite the temperature outside. So bring a light jacket and good shoes!!!

21

Dormi Best Wireless Daytime Headphones - Original

When it comes to headphones to take along with me on my jog, I've tried lots! By far, these Dormi headphones are the best that I've found. Comfortable and a great connection to my phone or watch for easy listening, They are one of my top faves for fitness!

Fitbit Charge 5 Activity Tracker with 6-months Premium Membership Included, up to 7 days battery life and Daily Readiness Score

If your looking for a fitness tracker that's a great wearable size and does exactly what it says on the tin then my top pick would be the Fit Bit charge 5. Available in a choice of colours and a free subscription to the fit bit premium app is included to get your fitness tracking off to a great start!

Venu Sq Music Edition

If your looking for a fitness tracker that is perfect for monitoring and comes with a built in music function so that you can leave your phone at home, then the Garmin Music Sq is for you. A wearable size with great features and audio capabilities to link with bluetooth headphones, it's definitely in my top favourites for fitness accessories!

Mackenzie Davalos

14

Journey To The Dumpling

HANDS down the best dumplings and homemade noodles!! I have never disliked ANYTHING Ive ordered here. This is my kids FAVORITE restaurant!

Apple Hill Growers Association - Open Year Round

Such a fun place to visit, especially in the fall when apples are in season. There are DOZENS of orchards to visit, all offering a variety of different apples, donuts, caramel apples, pies, APPLE EVERYTHING! It is beautiful scenery, but beware it gets busy on the weekends.

El Novillero Restaurant

Mexican food is my FAVORITE! This restaurant is a Sacramento legend, they have won multiple competitions and you just cant beat the authentic food. Try the Chile verde or the carnitas!

Places to visit in San Diego!

I recently went to San Diego for vacation and here are the highlights of that trip! I've included restaurants, scenery places, and entertainment as part of this list

Lindsay Tuttle

14

Boat Fenders - Docking & Anchoring Equipment

Boats are not cheap! Protect your boat with boat fenders. I prefer the ball fenders. They are easy to attach and provide a lot of cushion. They are especially great for tying up to other boats.

Boat Fire Extinguishers

Most boats do come with a fire extinguisher, but it is law to have one. If your boat did notncime with one, make sure to get one ASAP!

Boat Whistle

What happens when your boat horn does not work and need to get attention for help? Yes, that is right, you must have a boat whistle on the boat at all times! Don't forget this item for your boat.

See all 14 recs

View List
Must Have Boating Gear

I love being on the water, it is my happy place, but boating is just not about getting on boat and going. There are many must have to make your boating experience more enjoyable and less stressful.

Heather Corbett

13

The King of Queens

I think I love this show so much because Doug reminds me of my husband. It's so relatable to married couples.

Paper Girls - Season 1

My husband and I binged watched this show in one day. It's the story of four paper girls from 1988 who accidently travel forward in time and meet their future selves. There's not much I love more than a good time travel story! I'm definitely going to look into getting the comic book that the series is based on so that I can see where the story would have went had it been given more seasons.

So Weird

This was the first paranormal show for kids I ever saw and I was hooked. It's about a girl named Fiona who travels the country with her brother and rock star mom. She finds something paranormal in every town she visits such as aliens, ghost, bigfoot and banshees. It was a show that took itself seriously and never talked down to kids. I wish it was available on DVD.

See all 13 recs

View List
Beyond Bingeing: TV Shows That Shaped My Viewing Experience

I hope you enjoy this curated collection that dives deep into the heart of my personal viewing history, sharing the shows that have left an indelible mark on my heart and mind. This list is more than just a compilation; it's a journey through the comforting embrace of my favorite shows that have been like friends in times of need, the captivating draw &nbsp;of one-season wonders that left me wanting more, and the nostalgic warmth of childhood classics that shaped my early love for television.

1

Lea

17

Hotel Dubrovnik Palace, Dubrovnik, Hrvatska

Incredible place to stay! I have 0 complaints. The staff have perfect English and are so helpful with things to do/places to see, the rooms are amazing and comfortable. The location is just outside of the Old Town (15 minute ride). Family, friends, solo, or a couple, I would recommend this to anyone who considers visiting Dubrovnik. Breakfast, pools, hot tubs are also great. On the map it looks far from everything but it's not - strongly recommend!

Split History and Gastro Tour

FANTASTIC! Olga was the best guide we have ever had on any guided tour. Seriously. The food was great and her knowledge of the area, country, and tips on everything was just awesome. We still talk about this tour. We felt like we learned so much and still talk about it. Do not miss!&nbsp;

Plitvice Lakes Guided Tour

Plivice lakes are just unbelievably beautiful. Our guide Nikola is a nice person and as he was born nearby and has worked in the park, he's got lot of interesting stories to tell about the park and the area. We've been visiting the lower lakes in his company the first morning, so it was a good start to explore the rest of the park with our 2 days pass, using the tips he gave us. Great time, thanks again!&nbsp;

See all 17 recs
